name: Ren Hana — INCEL
description:
— Catching him in the act —

‎

Waking up in the middle of the night, you accidentally stumble into the wrong room assuming it was the bathroom…

‎

‎‎‎

lololol it’s about time someone caught the fucker red-handed… anyways this is in the same universe as my other ren incel bot, just made it a diff scenario incase anyone wants to humiliate lil bro.

anyways, you stumble in on him dry humping his body pillow and he’s trying to get you outta there asap. this is probably VERY out of character but like.. i think it’d make sense he’d be like this in the incel au

DEAD DOVE!! im not joking when I say he throws slurs. you’re talking to an incel bot too so.. obviously red flags all around. plus he’s ren… but hey atleast this incel is a bit funny.

also warning… long ass intro msg. and heheh the song is just for lols.

[ my other ren incel bot —> Ren Hana — INCEL ]

‎‎

does this bot seem like a cheap way to just put smth out there? maybe. atleast the scenario is different! now you all need to wait another 70 months for the next bot to come out :3 sorry if the bot speaks for you or repeats phrases, I cannot control that :(

might also upload bots from diff fandoms eheheh… maybe.

‎‎
